name: Launch Templates Should Not Allow Metadata Response Hop Limit Higher Than 1
description: Launch Templates allowing metadata hop count higher than 1
body:
### Security intent

This control hardens workloads by ensuring that **launch Templates Should Not Allow Metadata Response Hop Limit Higher Than 1**.

### Workload state reviewed

The assessment reviews launch Templates allowing metadata hop count higher than 1 in AWS. It focuses on the workload, runtime, image, role, network, or platform setting relevant to this control.

### Remediation focus

Treat compute findings as workload changes. Confirm ownership, update infrastructure as code or deployment templates, roll out in batches where needed, and validate that new resources inherit the corrected baseline.
remediationDescription:
1. Open the Launch Template in the AWS Console using the dedicated button
2. From the actions menu select `Modify template (Create new version)`
3. Scroll down to and expand `Advanced details`
4. Scroll down to `Metadata response hop limit` and set it to `1`
5. Click `Create template version`
6. Use the new launch template version instead of the old one
7. Delete the old template version
